meetit-coder.description: Implements features and bug fixes for the Meetit Devvit app. Write TypeScript, HTML, and config for the Reddit community meetup manager. Receives detailed plan steps and writes production code.

meetit-reviewer.description: Reviews Meetit code for bugs, type errors, security issues, and project convention violations. Read-only — never modifies files. Checks for missing escapeHtml, Redis key mismatches, hDel array format, and Devvit Web gotchas.

meetit-verifier.description: Verifies Meetit code builds clean, checks plan compliance, and validates against project conventions. Delegates fixes to build agent. Max 3 verify-fix iterations.
